title: Publication record (v2)
description: Append-only publish record, publications/<event_id>/<surface>-<ts>.json (design.md 1.2). Surface values are the publish surfaces of the status-by-surface routing table (design.md 1.4).

url.description: URL of the published artifact (page, archive link, or post permalink)

renderer_sha.description: Git SHA of the non-LLM templater/renderer that produced the surface output (design.md 5.2)
